title: ExecutionPlan
description: A compiled plan of discrete steps to execute a validated behavior proposal within defined scope constraints.

plan_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution plan.

proposal_id.description: The identifier of the originating behavior proposal.

validation_id.description: The identifier of the validation result that approved this plan.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this step within the plan.

operation.description: The type of operation this step performs.

path.description: The filesystem path this step operates on.

required_capability.description: The capability that must be granted to execute this step.

content.description: Optional content payload for create or modify operations.

steps.description: The ordered list of steps to execute.

required_capabilities.description: The full set of capabilities required to execute all steps in this plan.

allowed_paths.description: Paths within which plan execution is permitted.

scope_constraints.description: Constraints that bound the scope of this execution plan.

compiled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this plan was compiled.

compiler_signer_fingerprint.description: Optional fingerprint of the key used by the compiler to sign this plan.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this execution plan.
